prompt: Generate a premium Chinese study handout poster for AI graduate interview preparation. Focus only on Day 1. Include concise, well-structured Chinese study notes for data structures and algorithms: data structure, ADT, logical structure vs physical structure, sequential list vs linked list, stack, queue, circular queue, binary tree traversal, DFS, BFS, hash collision, sorting stability.
scene: clean paper-like light neutral background with generous whitespace
subject: Chinese lecture handout poster for Day 1 data structures and algorithms
style: premium infographic poster, academic editorial layout, print-like study guide
composition: vertical 3:4 poster, clear title area, stacked note sections, highly readable mobile-friendly layout
palette: off-white background, charcoal text, muted orange title accent, soft rose section bands, restrained blue numbering
materials: matte paper texture, subtle print quality
text: 人工智能方向 研究生复试讲义 Day 1 数据结构与算法
constraints: simplified Chinese only except standard CS terms; readable lecture-note hierarchy; no logos; no watermark
negative: cartoon icons, glossy UI cards, fake app UI, oversaturated colors, clutter
